{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165138538ADE9D9EA1E9D89670"}"},"total":7026},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7354178013198615320","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这文脑洞可以，设定大胆，题材比较创新，风格比较轻快，又出了几个梗，带动读者的笑点，津津乐道，有时候又被猝不及防的搞笑给撞到了(法庭大门不隔音[大笑])，游戏描述也很详细，如果搬进现实应该是挺有趣的，会适当的加些打脸的戏份，关于楚生的描写很细致，又紧扣主题，剧情相连，属于是比较风趣幽默的。
我还是推荐大家看一下(可能有部分人不喜欢看)，挺不错的一个文。希望作者再接再厉，多多更新！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712281960,"group_id":"7278676011321936958","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欲买桂花同载酒，终不似，少年游。
","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0KWyiSdxBPk+gT5ii+3s8A=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cf10aff1d7fe4846874cf1bcb469e330~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531414&x-signature=Y8PwC7tgbQ5sCO7RJr8EEIWczzs%3D","user_id":"56155060402","user_name":"꧁⚚银梦寒星⚚꧂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"56155060402","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7278676011321936958","book_info":{"abstract":"【非常刑】【可拷】【不当人】【直播玩梗】【爆笑】
PS：本书轻松欢乐，直播玩梗，搞笑文
穿越平行世界，楚生觉醒神级游戏设计师系统
破防主播观众，获得情绪值，解锁更多游戏
但楚生发现，自己解锁的游戏都太刑了！
解锁盗贼模拟器，虐哭呆小妹。
但因为盗窃过程太过真实，被警察叔叔请去喝茶；
解锁斗地主模拟器，化身车友车行，气疯宝哥。
但因为高超的出千手法，被警察叔叔请去喝茶；
解锁凶手模拟器，吓哭刘培茄。
但因为细致的尸体处理手法，再次被请到警察局备案：
全网玩家乐疯了。
“什么楚生！就是畜生！以折磨玩家为乐趣！”
“特大喜讯，楚生又双叒叕被请到警察局喝茶了！”
“史上最刑设计师！”
正当楚生郁闷时，系统解锁了间谍模拟器！
楚生：“坏了！这下摊上大事了！我还是去投案自首吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/37f364fcbba878ed884adef125752c77","author":"叫我大官人","author_id":"","book_id":"7278676011321936958","book_name":"我就设计个游戏，警察把我包围了","book_short_name":"畜生设计师","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7278678691805135422","read_count":"48491","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1342077"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"642","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/71d7b187d84e0261bf1a2ea3b614e9ea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180698&x-signature=aJtkYalv7oWIk0GRhPz1%2F3k4JFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1767651018807336","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"407"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165138538ADE9D9EA1E9D89670"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_
